strengths: 18+ years of fullstack experience with the core stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS in production roles
Direct AI agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Strong testing and craftsmanship background: TDD practice, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses, plus Docker/Kubernetes and CI/CD experience
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework for the role
Kotlin is absent and Java exposure appears limited to older robotics work; Python is not listed
No explicit evidence of authentication/authorization or security best-practices work

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and weak Kotlin/Java/Python coverage

response.justification: The role's core competencies are end-to-end TypeScript/Node/React delivery, testing rigor, cloud/containerization, polyglot backend ability, and AI agent development. The candidate exceeds the 6+ year bar with sustained senior fullstack work (Optilyz: TypeScript/React/MongoDB/AWS CDK; RIDE: Node/TypeScript/GraphQL with TDD and trunk-based development), demonstrates rare direct AI-agent experience (MCP code generators at re:cinq), and has Docker/Kubernetes plus MongoDB/MySQL evidence via GISCollective. Polyglot depth is proven (D, C++, Java, Swift, PHP), though Nest.js, Kotlin, and Python are absent, and security practices are not evidenced on the résumé. A CS degree (MIT) satisfies the education requirement. Strong evidence on high-weight competencies with gaps only in secondary technologies yields a high score.
